key_factors: Argentina is ranked 1st in the world (as of June 2026), while Austria is ranked 21st.

Argentina has a slight travel advantage, traveling ~560 miles from Kansas City to Dallas, whereas Austria traveled ~1,460 miles from Santa Clara to Dallas.
The match is held at Dallas Stadium (AT&T Stadium), where the roof is confirmed to be closed and climate-controlled, neutralizing any potential weather impact.
